name: fe_03_01892
context_text: <B> wrong time and even myself travelling with my daughter just going to the grocery i mean you never know and it's like i think everybody is suspicious to me { now } / <A> [ yes ] / <B> i always look at people and think you know i wonder if this person is about to pull upfront you know and i mean i remember driving on september eleventh 'cause i had to go return a movie and people were driving like they were crazy / <A> wow / <B> and i'm like calm down you know i mean / <A> yeah / <B> why do you have to act like this and and curse me out or whatever and you know you don't i mean everybody thought the world was ending / <A> oh / <B> and there was no peace / <A> ooh
